title: salix × sabulicola
intro: Salix × sabulicola, also known as the grayleaf willow or gray willow, is a hybrid plant species that combines the characteristics of two willow species, Salix lucida and Salix bebbiana. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Salix × sabulicola include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Salix × sabulicola include teas, salves, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the bark and leaves in hot water or oil to extract its medicinal compounds.
